zh.lifeSummary: Margery Clifton是Robert Clifton和Alice的女兒，於1412年出生在英國諾福爾可。她於1440年7月12日之前與Sir John Wyndham結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1456年在英國諾福爾可諾維其享年44歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可諾維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margery Clifton是Robert Clifton和Alice的女儿，于1412年出生在英国諾福爾可。她于1440年7月12日之前与Sir John Wyndham结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1456年在英国諾福爾可諾維其享年44岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可諾維其。

nameMeanings.name: Clifton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the very numerous places called Clifton, from Old English clif ‘slope’ (see Cliff ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cliff
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cliff(e), Cle(e)ve, or Clive, from Old English clif ‘slope, bank, cliff’, or a topographic name from the same word. The Old English word was used not only in the sense of modern English cliff but also of much gentler slopes and frequently also of a riverbank or seashore.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Margery Clifton was born in 1412, in Norfolk, England as the daughter of Robert Clifton and Alice. She married Sir John Wyndham before 12 July 1440. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1456, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, at the age of 44, and was buried in Norwich, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Margery Clifton est née en 1412, à Norfolk, Angleterre, fille de Robert Clifton et Alice. Elle a épousé Sir John Wyndham avant 12 juillet 1440. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1456, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Margery Clifton wurde 1412 in Norfolk, England, als Tochter von Robert Clifton und Alice geboren. Sie hat vor 12. Juli 1440 Sir John Wyndham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1456 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Norwich, Norfolk, England und wurde in Norwich, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Margery Clifton è nata il nel 1412 nel Norfolk, England come figlia di Robert Clifton e Alice. Lei sposato Sir John Wyndham prima del 12 luglio 1440. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1456, nel Norwich, Norfolk, England, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a Norwich, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Cliftonは1412年にイギリスノーフォルクでRobert CliftonとAliceの娘として生まれた。1440年7月12日以前にSir John Wyndhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1456年にイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで44歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクノーウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Clifton(은)는 1412년 영국 노르폴크에서 Robert Clifton(와)과 Alice의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1440년 7월 12일 이전 Sir John Wyndham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1456년 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 노위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margery Clifton nasceu em 1412, em Norfolk, Inglaterra filha de Robert Clifton e Alice. Ela casou-se com Sir John Wyndham antes 12 de julho de 1440. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1456, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Margery Clifton родилась в 1412 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. Её родителей звали Robert Clifton и Alice. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Wyndham перед 12 июля 1440 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1456 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Margery Clifton nació en 1412, en Norfolk, Inglaterra como hija de Robert Clifton y Alice. Se casó con Sir John Wyndham antes de 12 de julio de 1440. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1456, en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
